strategy: short-window window: keep Existing implementation referenced by: migrate: replace a small legacy API in place while Replacement implementation requested by: migrate: replace a small legacy API is rolled out batch by batch (1 batch(es) planned).
switchover_criteria: All declared inventory items have been touched and verification passes.
Release review verdict is release-approved or release-with-followups.
health_signals: No regressions reported by the release review.
rollback_path: Revert the batch sub-run commit; the pre-migration source still works because coexistence kept it in place.
risks: Single-batch v0 has no per-batch isolation — a partial failure rolls back the entire run.
